title: ITS NOT REAL [Legacy]
description:
ITS NOT REAL 
another minecraft horror mod
body:
**ITS NOT REAL**

 

_It never was
It was always in your head_



This mod adds a feature to “Close Your Eyes”, the default key to close your eyes is “G”
It also adds an “anomaly” to your world
I do not want to spoil too much of the Mod



This mod was not inspired by any other mods,
The “Close Your Eyes” feature was not stolen from flamco4’s “Shut Your Eyes” Mod, as I forgot about that Mod when I added it

And its recommended to use with the “Neruina – Ticking Entity Fixer” Mod



**PLEASE EXPECT BUGS

MOD ALSO NOT INTENDED FOR MULTIPLAYER**



Credits:

mystman12 - You’ll see eventually
